purpose: Turn Batch115 build-stability evidence into a guarded build path that can produce startable production artifacts in constrained environments while still preserving raw Next build truth.

beforeGuard: Raw next build with webpackBuildWorker enabled could leave orphan jest-worker children or timeout during compile/page-data collection.
Raw next build with workers disabled reached static generation but failed on missing .next/export/500.html or could hang during Collecting build traces in this audit environment.
observedRootCause.scope: Runtime/build closure only; no feature expansion.

guardedBuildRules: npm run build uses scripts/next-build-runtime-guard.mjs instead of calling next build directly.
npm run build:raw remains available and must be reported separately.
The guard may inject a minimal 500.html fallback only after static generation starts, avoiding early .next/export interference.
If required production artifacts exist and Next hangs at build trace collection, the guard records controlled_trace_timeout_with_startable_artifacts and exits 0 for deployability testing.
This guarded success is not identical to raw next build exit 0 and must not be used alone to claim production-ready.
allowedClaims: Guarded build path exists and can record startable artifacts.
Source-level route dynamic guards are present.
Raw next build is still tracked separately.
forbiddenClaims: Do not claim raw Next build passed unless npm run build:raw exits 0.
Do not claim production-ready without guarded build, live smoke, auth smoke and hosted smoke proof.
Do not hide controlled_trace_timeout_with_startable_artifacts as a normal Next build pass.
